steps.title: Match the pronoun
steps.content: The pronoun refers back to many historical newspapers, later called these rare items. Because that antecedent is plural and the pronoun is the object of access, the blank needs a plural object pronoun.

steps.title: Reject singular forms
steps.content: Choice A is singular. Choice C and Choice D are singular demonstratives. None agrees with the plural newspapers or rare items. The answer is B.
